title: Unexpected Interface Within a Package
body:
---


Author Name: **Bob Newgard**
Original Redmine Issue: 790 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2014-06-15


---

The attached file codes an interface within a package.  Verilator seems to not support this.

```
% verilator -Wall --cc interface_pkg.v
%Error: interface_pkg.v:2: syntax error, unexpected interface
%Error: interface_pkg.v:5: syntax error, unexpected endpackage
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
%Error: Command Failed /usr/bin/verilator_bin -Wall --cc interface_pkg.v

```

Environment

```
% verilator --version
Verilator 3.860 2014-05-11 rev verilator_3_856-70-gb46f656
% uname -a
Linux xxxxx 3.14-1-amd64 #1 SMP Debian 3.14.4-1 (2014-05-13) x86_64 GNU/Linux
dpkg -l | grep verilator
||/ Name              Version          Architecture Description
+++-=================-================-============-=============================
ii  verilator         3.860-1          amd64        fast free Verilog simulator

```
